concerns.text: T014 (Nilearn fallback) is listed AFTER T013 (fMRIPrep runner), but T013's description states 'if fMRIPrep exceeds 7GB RAM' implying fallback usage. The fallback implementation must precede the main pipeline that consumes it. Reorder: T014 before T013.

US2 tasks (T017-T024) depend on US1 output (preprocessed fMRI data from T013-T016), but no explicit cross-story dependency is documented. The plan states US2 can start after Foundational phase, but US2 actually requires US1 completion. Add explicit dependency note between Phase 3 and Phase 4.

T006 (base data schema for Dataset entity) is correctly placed in Phase 2, but T011 (OpenNeuro client) should explicitly reference T006 in its description to show the schema consumption relationship. Add 'uses Dataset schema from T006' to T011 description.

T009/T010 (tests) are correctly placed before implementation per TDD practice, but the 'Tests for User Story 1' section header should clarify these are TDD contract tests that will FAIL until T011-T016 complete, to avoid confusion about execution order.
